name: Focus Clock — Alarm, Timer & Stopwatch
description: Set alarms, timers, and a stopwatch on your new tab. Customize theme and background.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob:;
